User.title: User
User.description: A user of the DeepLearn application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

Session.title: Session
Session.description: A teaching session created by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the session.

description.description: A brief description of the session.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the session was created.

authorUID.description: The UID of the user who created the session.

sessions/{sessionId}.description: Stores teaching sessions created by users.
